creator: freebsd@dns.company
text:
At https://github.com/Exa-Networks/exabgp/releases I now see 4.1.2 having the badge "Latest release".
But does that mean it's a stable release or just the "latest release"?
Reading the comment:

"The control API / CLI command are however not yet frozen and will slightly change before a stable 4.1.0 release."

...plus the name "ISO-release" (for 4.1.1) sounds to me that it became stable last month.

Currently I don't install ExaBGP in production because it requires python 2.7
